title: Contact the Passport Program - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact the Passport Program
Tell us what you’re asking about to find out how you can reach us.

## Top questions about passports
- When should I renew my passport ?
- Can I renew my passport instead of applying for a new one ?
- Do I get a refund if my application wasn’t processed within the service standards ?
- I’m a dual citizen. Do I need my Canadian passport to return to Canada ?
- I got my new passport, but my supporting documents are missing. What should I do ?
- How do I open your application forms ?
See all questions in the Help Centre

## Get your passport application status instantly
Avoid waiting on the phone and check your application status online.
Check your passport application status

## Contact us about your passport in Canada
You can contact us online, by phone, by visiting our office or by mail.
You can reach us several ways depending on what you want to contact us about.
Give us a compliment
Give us feedback on our forms
We answer calls Monday to Friday, from 8:30 am to 5 pm, your local time (9:00 am to 5:30 pm in Newfoundland). We do not answer calls on statutory holidays .

### Call our toll-free or direct number
You can reach us at either of the numbers below.
Toll-free number: 1‑800‑567‑6868
Direct number: 1‑819‑997‑8338
If you’re hearing impaired or have a speech impediment, you can use our TTY service.
Find out the average time it took us to answer calls during the week.
You can visit us at a Service Canada Centre or passport office near you.
If you haven’t booked an appointment, you can check the walk-in wait time before you go.
Find a service location

### Mailing address (non-courier)
Passport Program Gatineau QC  K1A 0G3 Canada
Passport Program 22 de Varennes Street Gatineau QC  J8T 8R1 Canada
Passport offices and Service Canada Centres will be closed on these dates in 2026 :
- June 24 (Quebec only)
- August 3 (except Quebec)

## Contact us about your passport from the US
You can reach us several ways depending on what you want to contact us about.
Ask us a question through our
                            web form
Give
                            us a compliment
Submit
                            a complaint
Give us feedback on our
                            forms
We answer calls Monday to Friday, from 8:30 am to 5 pm, your local time. We do not answer
            calls on statutory holidays .

### Call our toll-free or direct number
You can reach us at either of the numbers below.
Toll-free number: 1‑800‑567‑6868
Direct number: 1‑819‑997‑8338
If you’re hearing impaired or have a speech impediment, you can use our TTY service.
Find out the average time it took us to answer calls during the week.
You can visit us at a Service Canada Centre or passport office near you.
If you haven’t booked an appointment, you can check the walk-in wait time before you go.
Find a service
                    location

## Contact us about your passport from abroad
Ask us a question through our web form
Give us a compliment
Give us feedback on our forms

### Find the nearest office
You should contact the nearest Government of Canada office abroad .
Call or email them before you visit them.
Find out how to get help in  case of emergency when you’re in a foreign country .

## Contact us about your refugee travel document or certificate of identity
To check the status of your application, you have to contact us. You need to be in Canada to
        do so.

### Submit a web
                form : Option 1 of 2
You can contact
                    us using our web form .

### Call us : Option 2 of 2
You can use our automated telephone service to check the status of your application 24 hours a day, 7
                days a week.
We also answer calls Monday to Friday, 8 a.m. to 4 p.m. (your local time), except for statutory
                holidays.

#### Call our toll-free number

#### Teletypewriter (TTY) service
Call us via the Bell Relay Service if you are hearing impaired or if you have a speech
                    impediment .
- Voice to TTY: 1-800-855-0511
- TTY to TTY: 1-800-855-1155

## Contact us about a passport media inquiry
Contact our Media Relations team at 1-613-952-1650 .
Email our Media Relations team at media@cic.gc.ca .
Contact Service Canada at 1-819-994-5559 .
You can get Passport Program statistics online. Updated weekly
